audit_items.proof_trace: Selector assumes descending order and returns first match via find_map. Named network constructors (sepolia L512-520, holesky L637-645, hoodi L739-747) define blob_schedule in ascending order, bypassing serde sorting. With ascending data, first match returns lowest epoch instead of highest.
audit_items.attack_scenario: On Sepolia at epoch 280000, selector returns entry (274176, max_blobs=15) instead of correct entry (275712, max_blobs=21). Node rejects valid blocks with 16-21 blobs, causing consensus failure.
